session.user: Run `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py::test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_json tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py::test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_display -v` and report results. This is a READ-ONLY check - do not modify files.

def test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_json( tmp_path: Path, monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch ) -> None: """Planned-PR save rejects plan with fallback title 'Implementation Plan'.""" ctx = _planned_pr_context( tmp_path=tmp_path, fake_claude=FakeClaudeInstallation.for_test(plans={"untitled": _UNTITLED_PLAN_CONTENT}), monkeypatch=monkeypatch, ) runner = CliRunner()
result = runner.invoke(plan_save, ["--format", "json"], obj=ctx)
... [34 lines omitted] ...
tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py:556: AssertionError """Planned-PR save shows error message for invalid title in display format.""" tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py:595: AssertionError FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py::test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_json - assert 1 == 2 FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py::test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_display - assert 1 == 2 ============================== 2 failed in 0.25s ===============================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 2 issues found
**Test Results:**
Both tests failed with exit code mismatches:
1. **test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_json** (file: `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py`) - Expected exit code: 2 - Actual exit code: 1 - Location: Line 556
2. **test_planned_pr_rejects_untitled_plan_display** (file: `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py`) - Expected exit code: 2 - Actual exit code: 1 - Location: Line 595
**Summary:** Both tests expect the `plan_save` command to exit with code 2 when rejecting an untitled plan (fallback title "Implementation Plan"), but the command is currently exiting with code 1 instead.
